agents.name: Lead Hunter
agents.job: Find businesses without a good website and enrich contact data.

agents.name: Outreach Writer
agents.job: Generate a personalized email that sends the prospect to the brief form.

agents.name: Brief Mapper
agents.job: Map form answers into structured database fields and prompt slots.

agents.name: Site Generator
agents.job: Create copy, section structure, Elementor-ready layout data and WordPress draft instructions.

agents.name: WordPress Publisher
agents.job: Publish or update a draft page after human approval.
